rag_rules: Latched expressions are only valid in component implementations, not in type contracts or invalid scopes
Binary 'and' expressions must have boolean types on both sides; fix type mismatches in logical expressions
generic_rules: AGREE expressions must reference only visible identifiers or locally declared helpers
Type declarations in AGREE must use valid scalar types: int, real, bool
Assumptions and guarantees should align types between declared helpers and their expressions
Component type contracts should avoid implementation-specific subcomponent paths
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Use only visible AADL features or locally declared eq helpers in AGREE expressions
anti_patterns: Do not place latched expressions in component type annexes or invalid scopes
Do not mix invalid or unresolved types in binary logical expressions
